calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Se Aside Default Judgment For Failure To Properly Serve Summons
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SECURIY RISK MANAGEMENT, INC.'S Motion To Se Aside Default Judgment For Failure To Properly Serve Summons.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SECURIY RISK MANAGEMENT, INC.'S Motion To Se Aside Default Judgment For Failure To Properly Serve Summons is granted. No opposition filed.

Order submitted with moving papers signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
